title: DragN's Livestock Overhaul: Permafrost
description: Adds Cenozoic animals to roam the landscapes of Minecraft.
body:
# Permafrost

Permafrost is a Livestock Overhaul Addon, originally meant just for friends on a TerraFirmaCraft modpack that adds animals from the Cenozoic era, mostly (but not exclusively) focusing on the Pleistocene.

This mod is best played with TFC. However, it isn't required.

 

Included Animals:

-Mammoth

-Deinotherium

-Direwolf

-Quagga

-Cervalces Latifrons

-Paraceratherium

-Dinofelis

**Patchouli** can be installed to get an ingame Permafrost Guide, which acts as the Wiki. (Recommended for new players)

<>

**Discord: https://discord.gg/2WznNTtVac**

Q: Animations won't play or aren't playing correctly?

A: This is actually a Geckolib issue. Try turning off your Entity Shadows in both your game options and your shader options, especially if you're using a shader loader like Iris. You can also try turning off the Iris/ Oculus Geckolib Compat mod if you're on 1.20.1. We can't fix this issue on our end unfortunately.

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
